rationale: Section 31.033 governs installment payment of taxes for business property in disaster areas. It does not reference homestead exemptions or §11.13(b), so increasing the homestead exemption amount creates no conflict.
quote: The governing body of a taxing unit may authorize a person to pay the taxing unit's taxes imposed on property that the person owns in installments.
_note: No cross-references to §11.13(b) or homestead exemptions appear in §31.033.
